---
title: "NeuralFrame Data Dictionary"
---

The following NeuralFrame tumor registry tables are available:

| Category | Table Name |
|:---------|:-----------|
| Tumor Registry | [case_diagnoses](case_diagnoses.qmd), [case_misc_details](case_misc_details.qmd), [case_outcomes](case_outcomes.qmd), [case_treatments](case_treatments.qmd) |
